## Summary

Describe the change and its interoperability evidence.

## Validation

- [ ] `swift test`
- [ ] `swift build -c release`
- [ ] No proprietary files or private captures added
- [ ] Synthetic tests added or updated
- [ ] No physical printer required by automated tests

## Evidence level

- [ ] Synthetic-test confirmed
- [ ] Official-output observed
- [ ] Physically device-confirmed
- [ ] Inferred/unresolved and clearly labeled
